what_it_measures: A source-defined technical area used to watch for false breaks, reversal moments, and retests in the Sniper trading framework.
use_cases: Frame a possible reversal area before constructing a setup checklist.
Require confirmation from a reversal moment and retest instead of treating the zone as a standalone signal.
failure_modes: Price breaks and holds beyond the zone.
The move into the zone is not clean enough for the source-defined setup.
No explicit risk limit is present, so execution must stay blocked.
